name: Raisin Zucchini Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Finely shred the zucchini to measure 2 cups; set aside.
2. Cream together the sugar and oil. Add the eggs, zucchini, and vanilla extract; mix well.
3. In a separate bowl, combine the flour, cinnamon, salt, baking soda, and baking powder; mix well.
4. Add the raisins and chopped walnuts to the dry ingredients. Combine with the zucchini mixture; mix until just combined.
5. Pour the batter into two greased and floured 9x5-inch loaf pans.
6. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean. Let cool on wire racks for 10 minutes before turning out onto a serving plate to cool completely.
